summary: Freeze docs/STUDIO-UI-FOUNDATION.md as the canonical Site Studio UI rulebook. The frozen rules supersede prior dashboard/card/shell proposals that conflict with the domain-level left nav, purpose-reactive workspace, ambient Shay model, Fritz filter, Night visual system, workspace contract, Media Studio prompt-first direction, contextual tools, and plan-then-approve pattern.
implementation_constraints: Do not make Workbench the default shell until the frozen workspace contract is implemented against real state.
Do not treat Media as a library-first domain; Media Studio is generation-first with library/results as supporting surfaces.
Do not add left-nav domains without following the frozen page rule and Fritz filter.
Do not show tools as static cards or global furniture; tools must be contextual to the selected object.
Do not perform canonical writes, brand-kit changes, deploys, expensive generations, or destructive changes without a proposal/approval gate.
known_gaps: Production Workbench prototype still drifts toward fixed dashboard chrome and must be rebuilt from the frozen contract before becoming the default shell.
Shay Desk right-edge/overlay behavior is frozen conceptually but not wired as a production context provider.
Media Studio prompt-first generation and production Media mini-app controls are not unified.
Plan/Task/Run state is still not rendered from the registry inside Workbench.
